title: the `podman manifest push` only push one image, but I build 4 ones
body:
### Issue Description

I built the image for 4 arches, but only one image was pushed to the registry. 


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.
```console
jiazha-mac:operator-framework-olm jiazha$ podman manifest create quay.io/openshifttest/operator-framework-olm:cert2-rotation-rhel9 
674e6cc3c104fd75b02d77d5c5dc8ef50f7d53df544c6ee1f7902c2263323059
```

2. build the image for 4 arches
```console
jiazha-mac:operator-framework-olm jiazha$ podman build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64,linux/ppc64le,linux/s390x --manifest quay.io/openshifttest/operator-framework-olm:cert2-rotation-rhel9 . -f operator-lifecycle-manager.Dockerfile
[linux/s390x] [1/2] STEP 1/11: FROM registry.ci.openshift.org/ocp/builder:rhel-9-golang-1.21-openshift-4.16 AS builder
Trying to pull registry.ci.openshift.org/ocp/builder:rhel-9-golang-1.21-openshift-4.16...
```

I guess I found the root cause that the base image is not multi-arch. Sorry for the bothing, closed it as not a bug.
```console
[cloud-user@preserve-olm-env2 jian]$ oc image info registry.ci.openshift.org/ocp/builder:rhel-9-golang-1.21-openshift-4.16 |grep Arch
Arch:        amd64
[cloud-user@preserve-olm-env2 jian]$ oc image info registry.ci.openshift.org/ocp/4.16:base-rhel9|grep Arch
Arch:        amd64
```
